name: AegirBio AB (publ)
summary: Aegirbio AB, a diagnostic company, offers tests to monitor and optimize the dosage of biological drugs in Sweden. The company focuses on therapeutic drug monitoring of biologic therapies in the autoimmune, oncology, and neurology space. It offers moNATor, a first dose-monitoring laboratory test to multiple sclerosis for healthcare professionals and patients. The company is based in Lund, Sweden.
